description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions. The sofa includes two loose throw pillows, one placed on each side, adding comfort and a casual touch. The armrests are straight, broad, and padded, extending to the same height as the backrest for a boxy, contemporary silhouette. The back of the sofa is plain and unadorned, with a continuous panel that matches the upholstery of the rest of the piece. The seat cushions appear slightly indented, suggesting a soft and inviting seating experience. The legs are not prominently visible, indicating a low-profile or recessed base design.
description: A modern, light beige two-seater sofa with broad padded armrests, two large seat and back cushions, and two loose throw pillows. The upholstery is smooth and solid, with a boxy, contemporary silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, two throw pillows, and broad, straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight profile of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, continuous back panel with no visible detailing or seams.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the other side, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two large, loose backrest cushions; two smaller, loose throw pillows placed at each end; all cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad, and padded armrests at each end, extending to the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, contemporary profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not prominently visible, suggesting a low-profile or recessed base, likely block-style and possibly made of wood or plastic, positioned at the corners.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, and continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions; no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching; uniform matte finish.
